name: fancircle
description: FanCircle — peer-to-peer, multilingual World Cup watch-party rooms with on-device AI translation and self-custodial USDT tipping. Built on Pears (Hyperswarm), QVAC, and WDK.

scripts.demo:minh: NAME=Minh LANG_CODE=vi PORT=8080 WALLET_DIR=.wallet/minh node src/backend.mjs
scripts.demo:alex: NAME=Alex LANG_CODE=en PORT=8081 WALLET_DIR=.wallet/alex node src/backend.mjs
scripts.demo:sam: NAME=Sam LANG_CODE=es PORT=8082 WALLET_DIR=.wallet/sam node src/backend.mjs
